description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing human figure with arms crossed over the chest, reminiscent of ancient Egyptian statuary. The figure wears an elaborate headdress with a tall central element and side flares, possibly representing a pharaonic or divine crown. The facial features are stylized and the body is elongated, with minimal detail on the limbs and torso. The surface appears weathered and patinated, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The overall form is slender and upright, with a solid base that allows it to stand independently. The coloration is predominantly dark gray with greenish oxidation, typical of aged bronze or copper alloys.
description: A slender, upright human figure with crossed arms and an elaborate headdress, featuring a weathered, dark gray-green patina.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full headdress, crossed arms, and facial features clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the headdress and the elongated body shape.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the headdress and the smooth, minimally detailed back of the figure.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the curvature of the base and headdress.
attribute_subject_matter: ancient Egyptian human figure with headdress
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
